sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for Genesis version

special_mechanics.name: Swimming
special_mechanics.description: Mr. Nutz can swim in some levels

special_mechanics.name: Enemy jumping
special_mechanics.description: Player can jump on most enemies to defeat them

special_mechanics.name: Tail strike
special_mechanics.description: Player can strike enemies with tail

special_mechanics.name: Projectile attack
special_mechanics.description: Player can throw collected nuts at enemies

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics but no precise physics parameters (gravity values, acceleration, jump velocities, or sub-pixel system data). Movement described qualitatively as running and jumping with swimming in select levels.
